title: tengine.contract.state v1
description: ContractState aggregate, read from the contract_state buffer (RES_CONTRACT_STATE = 447). Emitted at race-phase transitions, every state_cadence frames (default 60, ~1Hz at 60 FPS), and on silo shutdown (emit_final). Producer: crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/contract_event_emitter.rs, registry handle CONTRACT_STATE in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs. CloudEvents source is 'silo:<silo_name>:<session_id>'; subject is 'frame_<NNNN>'.

frame.description: GPU frame index at emission time.

race_phase.description: Race-phase enum at emission time; same enum as tengine.contract.violation.v1.

violations_total.description: Lifetime violation count from ContractState (monotonic, does not reset within a session).
